seoTitle: West Pymble vs West Tamworth — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Pymble and West Tamworth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Pymble vs West Tamworth: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Pymble and West Tamworth.
heading: West Pymble vs West Tamworth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Pymble, New South Wales and West Tamworth, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Tamworth has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to West Pymble (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Pymble or West Tamworth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Pymble has a flood risk score of 36/100, while West Tamworth scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Pymble scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. West Tamworth scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Pymble or West Tamworth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Tamworth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
